message:
test(formal): add proptest mirrors of TLA+ protocol verification (ft-283h4.3)

17 property tests mirroring the safety invariants verified by TLC model
checking in docs/formal/*.tla:

Mux Protocol (4 tests): message tracking, no duplicate delivery, ordered
delivery, combined invariant sweep across random action sequences.

Snapshot Lifecycle (5 tests): capture consistency, atomicity during restore,
no data loss after restore, no partial commit, roundtrip correctness.

WAL Correctness (5 tests): running state matches log, durable bound,
durable writes survive crash, compaction safety, crash/recovery roundtrip.

Cross-spec (3 tests): snapshot restore roundtrip, WAL crash recovery
preserves durable state, compact-then-crash preserves state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
